system.description:
Discipline: Dianxue
Skill: Medicine
Type: Normal
Qi: 4

You touch the eight meridian points of a person afflicted with Purple Spirit Venom to cure them. On a Success you ward off the effects of the Purple Spirit Venom for six hours per Rank of Dianxue. On a Total Success you ward off the effects of Purple Spirit Venom for one day per Rank of Dianxue. Cathartic: Used Cathartically this cures Purple Spirit Venom entirely on a Successful roll. Failed attempts do 6 Wounds to the target (-1 per Rank of Dianxue). When used Cathartically it also restores up to 2 Qi levels per Rank of Dianxue (only works on Qi Ranks lost due to Purple Spirit Venom).
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
